title: Harmonicon Lesson Manifest
description: One lesson in the curriculum: localized title/body keys, an optional playable chart, prerequisites, and pass criteria.

id.description: Stable identifier, unique across all lessons. Used as the profile key and in other lessons' prerequisites — never rename one that has shipped.

unit.description: Unit identifier grouping lessons in the menu. Localized via the Fluent key `lesson-unit-<unit>`.

title_key.description: Fluent key for the lesson's title.

body_key.description: Fluent key for the lesson's instructional body text.

chart.description: Path to a .harpchart, relative to the lesson's own directory. Absent = instructional-only lesson (no playable drill).

prerequisites.description: Lesson ids that must be passed before this one unlocks.

threshold.description: Minimum overall weighted accuracy (0..1) to pass.

technique.description: Technique bucket name — the same vocabulary SongStats/profile use.

threshold.description: Minimum accuracy (0..1) on that technique's notes to pass.

pass_criteria.description: How a chart-backed lesson is judged at the results screen. Absent = playing it through at all counts as done (or, for instructional-only lessons, the reader's Mark-as-Done button).
